name: Security Incident
description: Security finds issue → Dev creates fix → Main notifies human

steps.action: Document the security finding in detail. Write to shared/inbox/dev/ with subject 'Security Incident' and priority 'urgent'. Also write to shared/inbox/main/ with the same priority.
Read security incident from inbox. If an exposed secret, rotate it immediately. If a code vulnerability, create a fix PR. Report actions taken to shared/inbox/main/.
Read security reports from inbox. Send an urgent Telegram notification to Anthony with: what was found, what actions were taken, and what still needs human attention.
